hint_message: For code discovery, use project-search MCP tools first: search_graph(name_pattern) to find functions/classes, trace_path() for call chains, get_code_snippet(qualified_name) to read source. If the index is stale, call index_repository first. Fall back to Grep/Glob/Read only for non-code text search. If you need Grep, retry.
For running the test suite, prefer the run_tests_mcp tool over a raw Bash invocation — it aggregates output and respects project-specific test filters.
